claims: This overlay does not add a new persistence mechanism.
It verifies the Phase183 auto-watcher runner/startup fallback baseline.
It verifies the Phase185 blank-ZIP and pasteback ExpectedFilename hardening markers.
It verifies Phase186 reached the browser bridge, exact ZIP download, ZIP_READY, and direct closeout automatically.
It supplies current-phase verifier and QA scripts only; direct closeout and pasteback gates remain responsible for final safe merge and CLOSED_CLEANLY.
